regular.name: Regular
regular.description: Single-machine install. Your local installation. Most users pick this.

master.name: Master
master.description: Organization control plane. Manages policies, agent templates, and fleet telemetry for multiple employee machines. For IT administrators.

slave.name: Slave
slave.description: Employee machine managed by an IT admin. Receives policies and templates from a master install. Requires your admin's master URL and enrollment token.

wizard.title: Welcome to TitanX
wizard.subtitle: How will this install be used?
wizard.doneSubtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings → System → Fleet mode.

master.title: Master mode network settings
master.subtitle: Master TitanX exposes an API so slave machines can connect. Choose a port and network binding.
master.bindLocalDesc: Slave machines on this same computer only.
master.bindAllDesc: Accept connections from any machine on your network.
master.firewallHint: To allow slaves on other machines to reach this master, pick "All interfaces" and ensure your firewall allows inbound traffic on the chosen port.

slave.title: Connect to your organization's master
slave.subtitle: Ask your IT admin for the master URL and an enrollment token.
slave.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
slave.httpWarning: Unencrypted — use only on trusted networks.
slave.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from your IT admin
slave.tokenShort: Token is too short — minimum 16 characters.
slave.phaseANote: Enrollment handshake happens in the next TitanX release. For now, we'll save these values securely.

changeConfirm.title: Switch fleet mode?
changeConfirm.body: Changing the mode will restart TitanX. Your teams, conversations, and local data will be preserved.

restricted.title: {{feature}} is not available
restricted.body: This view is managed by your IT administrator and is not available on slave installs. Contact your admin if you need access.

placeholder.title: Fleet management
placeholder.body: Device roster, config sync, and fleet cost dashboards arrive in v1.9.27. This build ships the mode infrastructure only.

master.generateHint: Generates a one-time token an employee pastes into their slave setup wizard. Valid until its expiry or until used.
master.empty: No devices enrolled yet. Click "Generate enrollment token" to onboard the first slave.

revokeConfirm.title: Revoke this device?
revokeConfirm.body: The device will be unable to sync with this master until it re-enrolls.

token.warning: Copy this token now — it will NOT be shown again. Give it to the employee along with your master URL.
token.copyFailed: Could not copy token — select and copy manually

offline.title: Not connected to master
offline.body: This TitanX install can't reach its master right now. You can keep working — policies remain in effect and changes will sync when the connection recovers.

revoked.title: This device was removed from the fleet
revoked.body: Your IT administrator revoked this installation. Contact them to re-enroll, or switch to Regular mode in Settings.

unenrolled.title: Enrollment incomplete
unenrolled.body: This install is configured as a slave but hasn't completed enrollment. Open Settings → System → Fleet mode to connect to your master.

managed.label: Controlled by IT
managed.tooltip: This setting is managed by your IT administrator and cannot be changed locally.
managed.tooltipVersion: Controlled by your IT administrator (bundle v{{version}}). Local edits are rejected.
managed.iamDeleteBlocked: This policy is managed by your IT administrator and cannot be deleted locally.
managed.featureToggleBlocked: This feature is managed by your IT administrator and cannot be changed locally.

sync.title: Config sync
sync.managedKeysTitle: Keys controlled by your IT administrator ({{count}})
sync.noManagedKeys: No keys are currently managed. Local edits are unrestricted.

dashboard.title: Fleet Dashboard
dashboard.empty: No telemetry reports yet. Slaves push every 6 hours after enrollment.

device.title: Device telemetry
device.topActionsTitle: Top actions in the latest window
device.noReports: No reports from this device yet.

publish.whitelistFirst: Whitelist this template first before publishing to the fleet
publish.unknown: Template not found — refresh and try again
publish.deleteBlocked: This template is managed by your IT administrator and cannot be deleted locally.

rateLimit.perDevice: Too many pending commands for this device. Wait for them to complete or revoke some.
rateLimit.fleetWide: Fleet-wide command rate limit reached. Try again in an hour.

acks.title: Command acks
acks.empty: No devices have acked this command yet.

destructive.enqueued: Destructive command queued. Slaves will execute on next heartbeat.
destructive.reauthRateLimit: Too many failed password attempts. Wait 5 minutes before trying again.
destructive.passwordLabel: Confirm your password to authorize this action

cacheClear.title: Clear cache
cacheClear.warning: This will delete cache files on the selected device(s). Cached files are recoverable by re-downloading.

credentialRotate.title: Rotate credentials
credentialRotate.warning: This will wipe ALL saved provider API keys on the selected device(s). Users will re-enter keys on next use.

cacheClear.title: Cache cleared by your IT administrator
cacheClear.body: Scope: {{scope}}. Affected files will be re-downloaded as needed.

credentialRotate.title: Credentials rotated by your IT administrator
credentialRotate.body: {{count}} saved provider credential(s) cleared. You will be prompted to re-enter them on next use.

agentRestart.title: Restart agents
agentRestart.warning: This will terminate every active team session on the selected device(s). In-flight turns will be cancelled. No conversation data is deleted; teams rehydrate on the next user interaction.

forceUpgrade.title: Force app upgrade
forceUpgrade.warning: This will download the latest TitanX release and quit the app on the selected device(s). Users will lose unsaved work in any external tools they were running concurrently.

cacheClear.title: Cache cleared by your IT administrator
cacheClear.body: Scope: {{scope}}. Affected files will be re-downloaded as needed.

credentialRotate.title: Credentials rotated by your IT administrator
credentialRotate.body: {{count}} saved provider credential(s) cleared. You will be prompted to re-enter them on next use.

agentRestart.title: Agents restarted by your IT administrator
agentRestart.body: {{count}} active team session(s) terminated. Teams will rehydrate on your next interaction.

forceUpgrade.title: App upgrade triggered by your IT administrator
forceUpgrade.body: TitanX will quit and reinstall the latest release ({{newVersion}}) in a few seconds.

templateLibrary.title: Template Library
templateLibrary.subtitle: Publish local gallery templates to the fleet. Slaves pick up changes within 30 seconds.
templateLibrary.published: Template published — slaves will pick it up on next sync.
templateLibrary.unpublished: Template unpublished — slaves will stop receiving it on next sync.
templateLibrary.empty: No local templates to publish. Create one in the Agents Gallery first.

unpublishConfirm.title: Unpublish this template?
unpublishConfirm.body: Slaves will stop receiving updates for this template on their next 30-second config sync.

deviceHistory.title: Device history
deviceHistory.noCommands: No commands have targeted this device yet.
deviceHistory.noTelemetry: No telemetry reports received from this device yet.
